description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a test job that runs the before_script to install the nightly Rust toolchain via `curl -sSf https://static.rust-lang.org/rustup.sh | sh -s -- --channel=nightly --disable-sudo --yes` and then executes `cargo test`. In the deploy stage add a pages job that also runs the before_script, then runs `cargo doc` followed by `mv target/doc public`, publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. No specific Docker image or services are defined, so the default runner image is used.
